items.text_en: Kick-off meetings, planning, coordination, and role distribution among partners.
items.text_tr: Baslangic toplantilari, planlama, koordinasyon ve partnerler arasinda gorev paylasimi.

items.text_en: Students and teachers investigate sustainability topics, waste materials, and local practices.
items.text_tr: Ogrenciler ve ogretmenler surdurulebilirlik konularini, atik malzemeleri ve yerel uygulamalari arastirir.

items.text_en: Hands-on activities, design tasks, upcycling products, and collaborative classroom practices.
items.text_tr: Uygulamali etkinlikler, tasarim gorevleri, ileri donusum urunleri ve ortak sinif uygulamalari.

items.text_en: Partner visits, intercultural learning, peer interaction, and shared implementation experiences.
items.text_tr: Partner ziyaretleri, kulturler arasi ogrenme, akran etkilesimi ve ortak uygulama deneyimleri.

items.text_en: Sharing project outputs through digital media, school presentations, and public communication.
items.text_tr: Proje ciktilarinin dijital medya, okul sunumlari ve kamu iletisimi araciligiyla paylasilmasi.

items.text_en: Impact review, documentation, reflection, and long-term use of project materials.
items.text_tr: Etki degerlendirmesi, belgeleme, yansitma ve proje materyallerinin uzun vadeli kullanimi.
